allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(value-prop): enhance card images with glass morphism effects

VISUAL ENHANCEMENTS:
- Enhanced glass container with frosted background
- Added 16px backdrop blur for depth
- Multi-layer box shadows for elevation
- Cyan neon glow effects matching brand

FLOATING/DEPTH EFFECT:
- Base transform: translateY(-8px) for lift
- Deep shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)
- Cyan glow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 214, 203, 0.15)
- Inset border highlight for 3D depth

INTERACTIVE HOVER STATES:
- Smooth 0.4s cubic-bezier transitions
- Scale: 1.02 on container, 1.03 on image
- Enhanced lift: translateY(-12px)
- Brighter glow: 0 0 40px rgba(0, 214, 203, 0.3)
- Border brightens to rgba(0, 214, 203, 0.6)

IMAGE STYLING:
- Added 2rem padding around images
- Drop shadow filter for depth
- object-fit: contain for proper scaling
- max-width: 500px maintained

RESPONSIVE REFINEMENTS:
- Tablet (768px): Reduced padding to 1.5rem, gentler transforms
- Mobile (468px): Minimal padding (1rem), subtle transforms
- Maintained glass effect across all breakpoints
- Adjusted shadow intensity for smaller screens

DESIGN CONSISTENCY:
- Uses design system tokens (--radius-lg, --color-primary)
- Matches existing glass morphism aesthetic
- Cohesive cyan neon accent integration
- Premium floating card appearance
EOF
)")
